## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing platform and potential investment opportunity with Emergence Capital.](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has built an AI-powered platform to replace traditional marketing agencies, achieving $11M run rate in 1 year with 70%+ gross margins](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [The company uses AI workflows and expert human oversight to deliver high-quality, customized content marketing at scale](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Currently raising a round and selectively speaking with VCs who understand their unique service-software hybrid model](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Emergence expressed interest in learning more and continuing discussions](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Traction

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli (ex-CMO at several tech companies) and an experienced CTO](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Reached $11M run rate in 1 year since founder went full-time](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [70+ person team, including many experienced tech/marketing veterans](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - 70%+ gross margins, burned \<$3M to date
  - [Notable clients include Ramp, Augment Code, Webflow, Abnormal Security](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [AI-powered platform for end-to-end content marketing execution](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows (e.g. research, fact-checking) with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Internal tools for context engineering, content creation, and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Not currently offered as self-serve SaaS, focused on managed service model](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Business Model and Strategy

  - [Replacing traditional marketing agencies with tech-enabled managed service](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [8-week onboarding sprint to deeply understand client needs](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Long-term vision to build expert marketplace and modular apps](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Not competing directly with existing martech tools](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

### Fundraising Status

  - [Selectively speaking with \~10 VC firms](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Looking for investors who understand service-software hybrid model](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Have completed several partner meetings, some firms starting technical diligence](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Not rushing process, prioritizing finding the right long-term partner](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)

### Emergence's Initial Reaction

  - [Expressed interest in the category and GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2593.0)
  - [Appreciate the transparency and non-hype focus on building a real business](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2346.0)
  - [Want to review materials and potentially continue discussions](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to share data room and investment materials with Emergence team](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)
  - [Emergence to review materials over the weekend and follow up](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Potential technical diligence and further discussions if mutually interested](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Marcel to text contact info for quick communication if needed](https://fathom.video/share/PMRvzfZjtBjEogXuCzgaZzoSqj7wr3tV?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
